---
title: "NAACL 2021: More Accessible"
description: "Big applause to NAACL 2021 for making the conference more accessible."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-05-10"
categories: [NLP, NAACL, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![NAACL 2021 accessibility. Image from [NAACL 2021](https://2021.naacl.org/blog/dei-grants/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Big applause to NAACL2021 for making the conference more accessible! <https://2021.naacl.org/blog/dei-grants/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_naacl2021-diversityandinclusion-nlp-activity-6797690407288492032-yTMn).*
